global_description: A medium-sized bird with a stocky body, large head, and a prominent crest. It features a striking blue-gray plumage with a distinctive white collar and a broad, dark blue band across the chest. The wings and tail are marked with white spots, and the beak is long and pointed.
discriminative_attributes: White spots on wings and tail

part_details.head: Large, with a prominent crest and blue-gray color
part_details.beak: Long, pointed, and dark in color
part_details.chest: Broad dark blue band across white background

spatial_relations: The crest is positioned on top of the head
The beak extends forward from the face
The chest band runs horizontally across the upper body
The wings are attached to the sides of the body
The tail extends from the rear of the body
